title: Gujarat-based company develops 'AI Action Firewall' to make artificial intelligence systems safer
description: Jaipur, Mar 21 (PTI) A Gujarat-based neuro-engineering deep-tech AI company has developed an “AI Action Firewall” aimed at making artificial intelligence systems safer by verifying every action before execution, an official said on Saturday. title: based company develops 'AI Action Firewall' to make artificial intelligence systems safer
description: A firewall is a network security system for monitoring and controlling incoming and outgoing network traffic based on predetermined security rules. The firewall will function as a policy-based safety layer between AI systems and real-world operations, ensuring that actions are authorised, monitored and recorded, Saurabh Patel, founder and CEO of NeuroPause Lab Limited said.

title: Securing AI: The Next Frontier with Action Firewalls
description: A Gujarat-based company introduces AI Action Firewall, a groundbreaking technology to secure artificial intelligence actions by verifying them before execution. Inspired by traditional firewalls, this innovation ensures AI activity authorization, monitoring, and recording, enhancing transparency, accountability, and regulatory compliance in AI systems.

title: Top Republicans criticised as they share ‘cringe’ AI baby videos
description: High-profile Republicans and supporters have been criticised for 'cringe' and 'pathetic' videos created using artificial intelligence depicting them as babies.
